projectSummary: Sprint 12 is converging on a Friday production deployment. Auth is already shipped (Sarah), the database migration is wrapping up today (Mike), and the frontend is 80% done (Lisa), but Lisa is blocked on missing API specs and Alex has just discovered 3 critical bugs in a still-being-set-up testing environment. Two infrastructure items have no named owner in the standup — the missing API documentation and the downed staging server — and both are on the critical path to the Friday ship.
objectives: Ship the Sprint 12 release to production on Friday (2026-07-03)
Clear the API documentation and staging server blockers within 24 hours
Triage and close all 3 critical bugs Alex surfaced before the deploy
Complete Mike's database migration today and Lisa's remaining 20% of frontend components by ship date
Finish Sarah's password reset feature in parallel with the deploy prep

tasks.name: Fix the 3 critical bugs found in the testing environment

risks.name: API documentation is missing and is blocking Lisa's frontend completion ahead of Friday's production deploy
risks.description: API documentation is missing and is blocking Lisa's frontend completion ahead of Friday's production deploy
risks.solution: Assign a clear owner today (no owner is named in the standup) to produce the API specs from the live endpoints or recent commits within the next 24 hours so Lisa can finish the remaining 20% of frontend components before the Friday deploy.

risks.name: Staging server is down, blocking end-to-end testing of the 3 critical bugs Alex found and the full release cut
risks.description: Staging server is down, blocking end-to-end testing of the 3 critical bugs Alex found and the full release cut
risks.solution: Hand the staging outage to a named DevOps/infra owner today to restore service and confirm Alex can reproduce and verify fixes against it; gate the Friday production deploy on staging being green.

risks.name: Three critical bugs surfaced during the testing environment setup could derail the Friday production deploy
risks.description: Three critical bugs surfaced during the testing environment setup could derail the Friday production deploy
risks.solution: Triage the 3 critical bugs today with Alex, Sarah and Mike; treat Friday's deploy as conditional on all 3 being fixed and regression-tested on a clean staging environment.

risks.name: Friday production deployment depends on migration, frontend, bug fixes and API docs all converging in two days
risks.description: Friday production deployment depends on migration, frontend, bug fixes and API docs all converging in two days
risks.solution: Hold a go/no-go review on Thursday with Sarah, Mike, Lisa and Alex; pre-define a minimum-release cut so a slip on one item (most likely the missing API docs) does not push the entire ship date.

recommendations.title: Assign named owners today to the API docs and the staging server outage — both are currently unowned and both gate the Friday deploy.
recommendations.description: Assign named owners today to the API docs and the staging server outage — both are currently unowned and both gate the Friday deploy.

recommendations.title: Hold a Thursday go/no-go deploy review with Sarah, Mike, Lisa and Alex; pre-agree a minimum-release cut in case API docs are still incomplete.
recommendations.description: Hold a Thursday go/no-go deploy review with Sarah, Mike, Lisa and Alex; pre-agree a minimum-release cut in case API docs are still incomplete.

recommendations.title: Have Sarah and Alex pair on the 3 critical bugs to compress the fix/regression cycle before the Friday cut.
recommendations.description: Have Sarah and Alex pair on the 3 critical bugs to compress the fix/regression cycle before the Friday cut.

recommendations.title: Lock down the production deploy plan and rollback procedure by end of today so Mike's migration and Friday's release do not race on the same day.
recommendations.description: Lock down the production deploy plan and rollback procedure by end of today so Mike's migration and Friday's release do not race on the same day.
